taskName: Service lifecycle and LAN address strategy
goal: Implement the FileEasy service lifecycle, startup recovery, and LAN address plus QR refresh strategy defined in the design document.
nonGoals: Do not implement chunk upload logic.
Do not redesign the upload or admin web pages.
Do not change file metadata storage.

acceptanceChecks.text: When the device has a usable Wi-Fi or hotspot IPv4 address, the homepage should show a LAN upload address and a QR code that targets the upload page.
When the device has no usable LAN address, the homepage should clearly show that no upload address is available and should not present a misleading QR code.
When the device reboots, FileEasy should restore the local service according to the lifecycle rules in the design document.

publishPolicy.commitMessage: FE-T002: FileEasy service lifecycle and LAN address strategy
publishPolicy.prTitle: FE-T002: FileEasy service lifecycle and LAN address strategy

handoffQuestions: List only platform or device-specific lifecycle risks that require PM awareness.
